channel.title: Posts on AI Technologist
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on AI Technologist

item.title: Welcome
item.description: The Blog for the AI Technologist of the 21st Century Helping you build Intelligent systems Keeping you abreast with the latest developments in AI Sharing insights on new technologies in AI Providing a front seat preview on confrences, webinars and workshops. Reviews of Courses, Books, Videos and Tutorials. reach out to know more
